text: A large silver decorative elephant is standing on a white cloth in a yard.
Two white geese walking beside a small pond.
A woman holds up a checkered pink umbrella for the rain
A surfer rides a small wave and has a good balance.
A skateboarder flips his skateboard while others look on.
a man and a women who are at a table eating.
an image of a train going down the railroad track
A man rides a bike past construction workers on a busy street.
A man sitting down with a television remote in his hand.
Two people and a child wearing costumes hold archery equipment.
